content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于1月16日15:45(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年1月30日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、综合
【预购纪行：古国杂俎】
● 更新后 - 2 月 23 日 9:00 期间，预购纪行「古国杂俎」限时开放！
    ○ 购买纪行需要「源液」×1980。购买后，随着日期解锁累计可额外获得：「银芯」×20000、「流明之芯」×30、「原型视界」×1、「循环母版」×1、「群星余梦」×25、「碎裂余梦」×100。
    ○ 在 1 月 26 日 9:00 前购买还可额外获得：专属奖励纪念头像「扇中真形」、「无形者的请柬」×10！
    ○ 守密人可以在「活动」中查看本期预购纪行。
 
二、优化和问题修复
【一般】
● 优化了「战斗」中属性和状态变化的文字显示布局，让数值更清晰已读。
【相位对弈】
● 修复了「相位对弈」中命轮「命运轮盘赌」无法正确生效的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中钥令「鼠鼠的智慧」在当前算力已超过最大算力的情况下使用会导致失去算力的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中命轮「倒数时刻」的施加的倒数时刻效果无法被钥令「一声枪响」正确移除的问题。
 
【本地化】
在英语语言设置下：
● 修复了敌人「原初信徒」的意图「遗失的久远之城」翻译错误的问题。
● 修复了密契「扭曲双子·黑」、「扭曲双子·白」背景故事描述翻译格式错误的问题。
● 修复了「多维连接-银与血的洗礼」的关卡标题中翻译显示错误和部分翻译中拼写与措辞错误的问题。
● 修复了部分技能描述翻译中错误显示了代码的问题。
● 修复了部分物品描述中界域名称翻译错误的问题。
● 修复了来自「汉娜」的新年祝福邮件中翻译格式错误的问题。

**V2.4.1.3 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on January 16 at 15:45(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on January 30, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Comprehensive
[Pre-Order Archives: Panlong Soliloquies]
● After the update - From February 23rd, 9:00 AM, the pre-order event "Panlong Soliloquies" is available for a limited time!
○ Purchasing the Chronicle requires Silver Prime ×1980. After purchase, you can unlock additional rewards over time: Silver ×20000, Luminous Core ×30, Prototype Horizon ×1, Timeloop Copy ×1, Dreamspark ×25, Dreamshard ×100.
○ Purchase before 9:00 AM on January 26 to receive an additional exclusive reward commemorative avatar "Behind Her Fan" and "Formless One's Invitation" ×10!
○ Keepers can view the current pre-order journey in the "Event".

2. Optimizations and Problem Fixes
[Normal]
● Optimized the text display layout for attribute and state changes in "Battle," making the values clearer and more readable.
[Traphase]
● Fixed the issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Fate Roulette" could not activate correctly in "Traphase."
● Fixed an issue where using the Posse "A Mouse's Wisdom" in "Traphase" when current Arithmetica exceeds the maximum Arithmetica would result in losing Arithmetica.
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the Countdown Moment effect applied by the Wheel of Destiny "Countdown Moment" could not be correctly removed by the Posse "A Gun's Cry."

[Localization]
Under English language settings:
● Fixed the issue where the enemy "Primordial Devoutee" intention "Lost City of Lemuria" was incorrectly translated.
● Fixed the formatting issue in the translation of the background story descriptions for the Covenant "Twisted Twins: Black" and "Twisted Twins: White."
● Fixed the translation display errors in the stage title of "Multidimensional Connection - The Baptism of Silver and Blood," as well as spelling and wording errors in some translations.
● Fixed the issue where some skill description translations incorrectly displayed code.
● Fixed the issue with translation errors of Realm names in some item descriptions.
● Fixed the issue with translation formatting errors in the New Year blessing email from "Hannah".
... No helot gmurphy + hameln gmurphy nerf for traphase?
